expectations.text: Explicitly states ISO 27701 is not a GDPR safe harbor
expectations.evidence: keywords: ['not a GDPR safe harbor', 'not a safe harbor']... matched 2

expectations.text: Acknowledges that ISO 27701 can serve as positive evidence of compliance efforts
Identifies specific GDPR obligations not fully covered by ISO 27701
Addresses how supervisory authorities view ISO 27701 certification
Explains it is not an approved Article 42 GDPR certification scheme
